hero.title: Our Menus
hero.subtitle: From breakfast boards to happy hour spreads, we've got delicious options for every occasion and budget.

intro.subheadline: We love creating custom menus tailored to your specific needs — contact us for a personalized quote!

items.name: Breakfast Buffets
items.description: English style with eggs, sausage, roasted potatoes, beans & mushrooms. Or Colorado style with cheesy scrambled eggs, sausage, green chili potatoes & tortillas.

items.name: The Continental Board
items.description: A medley of mini croissants, egg bites, fresh fruits, yogurts & granola, cheeses, mini muffins & pastries.

items.name: Bagel Board
items.description: A delicious spread of fresh bagels with cream cheeses, peanut butter, jam, and ham.

items.name: Breakfast Burrito Board
items.description: A medley of meat and vegetarian burritos, served with salsa & our famous sour cream.

items.name: Lunch Platters
items.description: Our signature sandwiches and wraps served family style. Includes your choice of chips or side salad and a cookie.

items.name: Signature Wraps
items.description: Buffalo Chicken, Italian Chop, Crispy Chicken Crunch, Mediterranean Gyro — all packed with flavor and fresh ingredients.

items.name: Premium Hoagies
items.description: Roast Beef & Provolone Grinder, Turkey Bacon Avocado, or our famous Garden Veggie Hoagie with hummus and avocado velvet.

items.name: Build-A-Bowl
items.description: Choose your base (sesame rice, quinoa, couscous), protein (chicken, pork, beef, tofu), sauce, and toppers. Served via Crock Spot food truck or buffet!

items.name: Charcuterie Boards
items.description: Beautifully crafted boards featuring premium meats, artisan cheeses, fresh fruits, nuts, and accompaniments.

items.name: Grazing Tables
items.description: Stunning, Instagram-worthy displays perfect for larger gatherings. A feast for the eyes and the appetite!

items.name: Taco Bar
items.description: Street taco tortillas, cilantro lime rice, southwest chicken, ground beef, fajita veggies, all the toppings, chips & guacamole.

items.name: Mediterranean Bar
items.description: Build a pita or salad with gyro meat, feta spanakopita, pita bread, Greek olives, hummus, tzatziki, and tabouli salad.

items.name: BBQ Sandwich Bar
items.description: Tangy Carolina pulled pork, smoked chicken or cheddar brats, mac salad, cole slaw, baked beans, corn on the cob, hoagies.

items.name: Soup & Salad Bar
items.description: Choice of 2 soups (Tomato Bisque, Chicken Tortilla, Baked Potato, Red Chili) plus a full salad spread with proteins and cornbread.

finalCta.subheadline: Tell us about your event and we'll create a custom menu and quote that fits your needs perfectly.
